name: Step-by-Step: Reporting Injury to Employer in Utah

mainEntity.name: How do I report a workplace injury to my employer in West Jordan, Utah?
mainEntity.text: How do I report a workplace injury to my employer in West Jordan, Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify your employer orally or in writing immediately, ideally within 24 hours. Provide injury details, date, time, and witnesses. Utah requires formal notice within 180 days.

suggestedAnswer.text: Use a written incident report form if available. Verbal notice starts the process, but written protects you. Employers must report to Utah Labor Commission within 7 days for lost-time injuries. Failure to report promptly can jeopardize benefits; insurers scrutinize delays in Sandy/West Jordan claims.
